# TurfGameDen

> Tamil Nadu's #1 online cricket turf booking platform

TurfGameDen (https://turfgameden.com) is a premium sports technology platform that lets players discover, browse, and instantly book cricket turfs across Tamil Nadu, India. Turf owners can list and manage their grounds through a dedicated dashboard.

## Developer

Built by **Elangkumaran BS** (also known as elangkumaranbs / elangkumaran).
GitHub: https://github.com/elangkumaranbs

## Key Features

- Real-time slot availability for cricket turfs
- Instant online booking with Razorpay payment integration
- Verified, floodlit cricket grounds (night play available)
- Distance-aware turf discovery ("Nearest First" sorting)
- Player reviews and star ratings for every turf
- Turf owner management dashboard (bookings, slots, analytics)
- Push notifications (FCM) for booking confirmations
- Progressive Web App (PWA) with offline support

## Service Area

- Gobi (Gobichettipalayam), Tamil Nadu
- Sathy (Sathyamangalam), Tamil Nadu
- Erode, Tamil Nadu
- Tiruppur, Tamil Nadu
- Expanding across Tamil Nadu

## Tech Stack

Next.js 14, TypeScript, Firebase Firestore, Firebase Auth, Firebase Cloud Messaging, Cloudinary, Razorpay, EmailJS.

## Pages

- / - Home page with hero, features, and CTA
- /turfs - Browse all cricket turfs with search, filter, and sort
- /turfs/{id} - Individual turf detail with booking, gallery, and player reviews
- /about - About TurfGameDen and its mission
- /services - Services for players and turf owners (partner registration)
- /contact - Contact information for support
